headline: A Look At Fortive (FTV) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: What Fortive’s Recent Returns Tell You Fortive (FTV) has been in focus after a recent stretch of mixed share performance, with a 1 day return of around a 1% decline, a 3% decline over the past week, and a 4.5% decline over the past month. Over the past 3 months, however, the stock shows a 6% return, with year to date performance at about 3.6% and a roughly flat 1 year total return. Longer term holders are looking at total returns of about 20% over 3 years and 15% over 5 years. Alongside these...
